copy.step1_prompt: What would you like AI to help you improve or create today?
copy.step1_subtext: Pick something small or ambitious. You can try another path later.
copy.step2_prompt: Which version of that goal feels closest to what you need?
copy.step2_subtext: Pick the one closest to what you have in mind. You can edit later.
copy.step2_other_placeholder: Describe the version you have in mind (a sentence is fine).
copy.step3_prompt: Tell the AI enough to understand your course.
copy.step3_subtext: All fields are optional, but more context helps the agent.
copy.step4_prompt: What materials or constraints should the AI know about?
copy.step4_subtext: Check anything you have on hand. "Starting from scratch" is a fine answer.
copy.review_prompt: Review your selections, then copy the prompt and open the agent.
copy.review_subtext: Edit any block by clicking its Edit link. The prompt below is what gets copied.
copy.copy_button_label: Copy prompt and open the agent
copy.reflection_subtext: Optional — but helpful for shaping future workshops.
copy.step1_other_placeholder: Briefly describe what you'd like AI to help with.
copy.step4_other_placeholder: Briefly describe any other materials or constraints.
copy.no_materials_text: No materials yet — starting from scratch.
copy.bridge_header: Your prompt is on its way.
copy.bridge_confirmation: We've copied your prompt to your clipboard and opened the Pamplin Teaching Companion in a new tab. Paste the prompt as your first message there. If the new tab didn't open, click the link below.
copy.bridge_prompt_textarea_label: Your assembled prompt (manual copy if needed):
